case_title: PANFILO ARMAS VS. KEY OK SOON

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE TO NOV-6-2019 AT 8:30 A.M. DEPT 506. JUDGE PRO TEM RECUSES HERSELF FROM HEARING THIS MATTER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER SENT TO PLAINTIFF- UNABLE TO FORWARD -
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-07-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SOON, KEY OK
ORDER RE: CONTINUED DEFENDANT WILL NOT STIPULATE.
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-25-2019 - CONTINUED TO NOV-06-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL STATES A CONFLICT PRIOR TO THE START OF TODAY'S HEARING AND RECUSES HERSELF FROM THIS MATTER. PLAINTIFF PANFILO ARMAS, IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KEY OK SOON, IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-29-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PANFILO ARMAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KEY OK SOON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FORGOT HER READING GLASSES, AND REQUIRED A KOREAN INTERPRETER FOR LEGAL WORDING/ISSUES/CONCEPTS ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF PANFILO ARMAS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT KEY OK SOON IS PRESENT. CASE DISMISSED AT 8:45 A.M. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL SENT TO PLAINTIFF- UNABLE TO FORWARD -
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ARMAS, PANFILO DBA AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT SOON, KEY OK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-25-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-29-2020 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-26-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PANFILO ARMAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KEY OK SOON IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED KOREAN INTERPRETER TED KIM. DEFENDANT WILL NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R.
